title: AI Filmmaking Workflow: How To Create AI Videos With Full Automation
summary: A tutorial demonstrating TopView Drama Studio, a tool for automated AI filmmaking that generates cinematic short films with consistent characters, dialogue, and lighting from minimal input. The workflow covers story creation, character design, error correction, and final rendering in a single platform.
